title: Random Multiple Access Scheme Protocol
author: Emmanuel, Douglas Ikiomoye
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Abstract: This paper considers random access protocol, which is part of multiple access scheme protocol. It focuses on carrying out a background research of the Aloha and CSMA family in terms of performance, throughput and offered load. Furthermore,  the paper presents, compares and discusses the measurements result obtained in Aloha’s and CSMA’s family in terms of throughput and offered load using Matrix Laboratory, C++ and QualNet simulator.
steps_raw: Abstract: This paper considers random access protocol, which is part of multiple access scheme protocol. It focuses on carrying out a background research of the Aloha and CSMA family in terms of performance, throughput and offered load. Furthermore,  the paper presents, compares and discusses the measurements result obtained in Aloha’s and CSMA’s family in terms of throughput and offered load using Matrix Laboratory, C++ and QualNet simulator.
